use std::sync::{Arc, Mutex};

struct Node {
    value: i64,
    // BAD: Arc cycle — parent holds Arc to child, child holds Arc to parent
    parent: Option<Arc<Mutex<Node>>>,
    children: Vec<Arc<Mutex<Node>>>,
}

fn build_tree() -> Arc<Mutex<Node>> {
    let root = Arc::new(Mutex::new(Node {
        value: 0,
        parent: None,
        children: Vec::new(),
    }));

    let child = Arc::new(Mutex::new(Node {
        value: 1,
        parent: Some(Arc::clone(&root)),
        children: Vec::new(),
    }));

    root.lock().unwrap().children.push(Arc::clone(&child));
    // child also holds Arc to root — cycle!
    root
}
